title: Daily backup cron job silently never runs
description_md:
There's a nightly backup script in `/etc/cron.daily/backup`, but backups haven't been produced for days — with no errors anywhere obvious. The script works when you run it by hand. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), work out why `cron.daily` skips it, and fix it so the daily runner will actually execute it.

You're done when running the daily jobs (`run-parts /etc/cron.daily`) produces the backup at `/var/backups/app-backup.tar`.
